objectives.title: Agent architecture boundaries are visible
objectives.pass_claim: Static Agent, tool, and runner evidence is present in the bounded SDK scope.
objectives.unknown_claim: The bounded SDK scope does not prove every Agent responsibility boundary.
objectives.recommendation: Keep Agent, sub-Agent, tool, and runner responsibilities explicit and independently testable.

zh-CN.title: Agent 架构边界可识别
zh-CN.pass_claim: 有界 SDK 范围内存在可定位的 Agent、工具与 Runner 静态证据。
zh-CN.unknown_claim: 有界 SDK 范围不足以证明每个 Agent 的职责边界。
zh-CN.recommendation: 保持 Agent、子 Agent、工具与 Runner 职责清晰，并确保各自可独立验证。

objectives.title: Tool governance evidence is inspectable
objectives.pass_claim: The bounded SDK scope contains static tool, permission, and failure-handling evidence.
objectives.unknown_claim: The bounded SDK scope does not prove a complete permission boundary for every tool.
objectives.recommendation: Bind each tool registration to explicit authorization and failure evidence.

zh-CN.title: 工具治理证据可核查
zh-CN.pass_claim: 有界 SDK 范围内存在可定位的工具、权限与失败处理证据。
zh-CN.unknown_claim: 有界 SDK 范围不足以证明每个工具都具备完整的权限边界。
zh-CN.recommendation: 将每项工具注册与明确的授权依据和失败处理证据关联。

objectives.title: Evaluation feedback paths are present
objectives.pass_claim: Evaluation and feedback evidence is present in the bounded SDK scope.
objectives.unknown_claim: The bounded SDK scope does not prove that evaluation feedback reaches every Agent path.
objectives.recommendation: Expose a traceable link from evaluation results to the Agent path being assessed.

zh-CN.title: 评估反馈路径可识别
zh-CN.pass_claim: 有界 SDK 范围内存在可定位的评估与反馈证据。
zh-CN.unknown_claim: 有界 SDK 范围不足以证明评估反馈覆盖每条 Agent 路径。
zh-CN.recommendation: 为评估结果与其所对应的 Agent 路径建立可追溯关联。
